channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in CSS (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in CSS nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 📝 alchaincyf/huashu-md-html (743 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: alchaincyf

📝 Repository: alchaincyf/huashu-md-html

📄 Descrizione: md/html 双向流水线 · 三个能力一站式：万物→md / md→精美html / html→md。封装 markitdown + Pandoc + html-to-markdown + trafilatura。4 套反 AI slop 主题。Claude Code skill.

⭐ Stelle: 743

🍴 Forks: 79

💻 Linguaggio: CSS

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-09T15:34:26Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-06T23:33:26Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 ab-613/OpenGravity (218 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: ab-613

📝 Repository: ab-613/OpenGravity

📄 Descrizione: A lightweight, vanilla JS, open source BYOK (Bring Your Own Key) clone of the Google Antigravity UI. It currently features a live xterm.js terminal with direct local file system sync and a sidebar agent capable of running commands and editing files. Built in pure HTML/CSS/JS for maximum speed and zero installation.

⭐ Stelle: 218

🍴 Forks: 17

💻 Linguaggio: CSS

📜 Licenza: GNU General Public License v3.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-11T11:51:33Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-07T08:04:36Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 zhishile/codex-auth-helper (203 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: zhishile

📝 Repository: zhishile/codex-auth-helper

📄 Descrizione: Codex登陆助手：安全地在本地导出您的已登录 ChatGPT 会话配置，生成符合 Codex 规范的 auth.json 本地备份文件。

⭐ Stelle: 203

🍴 Forks: 36

💻 Linguaggio: CSS

📜 Licenza: No license

item.title: 📝 m1ckc3s/project-fathom (68 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: m1ckc3s

📝 Repository: m1ckc3s/project-fathom

📄 Descrizione: Tiny React sandbox proving you can fire native iOS haptics from a plain web page (no app) using the WebKit <input switch> control — verified on-device, works after the iOS 26.5 patch.

⭐ Stelle: 68

🍴 Forks: 2

💻 Linguaggio: CSS

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-06T01:12:53Z

]]>

item.title: 📝 yangdada863/aimy-sikll (18 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: yangdada863

📝 Repository: yangdada863/aimy-sikll

📄 Descrizione: aimy-skill 是一个轻量级、可嵌入 AI Agent 的渗透测试辅助技能，专为授权环境下的自动化信息收集和基础漏洞探测设计。它可以被 AI 助手（如 AutoGPT、LangChain 应用）调用，也可以独立命令行运行。
